Home | Products | Privacy

Sample Privacy Policy

We collect information you provide and information generated by your use of our services.

Use of data for AI model training

We may use content you share to train our generative AI models. You can opt out in settings.

Data retention

We retain content for up to 24 months after account closure.

Third-party sharing

We do not sell your personal information.

Last updated: January 1, 2026.
